posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Include the country column (or location column) and text column within conditional workflows.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to create a workflow wherein a random trigger happens. When that trigger sets off, IF the country is XX, then set status to Y; however, IF the country is DD, then set status to Z.

With regards to Text columns, this would definitely be trickier, but I would allow for free-form here, or even dynamic. For example:

When trigger happens, get item data, if TEXT is “XYZ”, then find matching item in Board XYZ, etc. etc. However, if TEXT is “BDY”, then find matching item in Board BDY.
